summary: CRITICAL: Workflow references ./MatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 (line 47) and fixtures/ directory (line 57) that don't exist—workflow will fail with 'Fixture directory not found' or zero fixtures. TDD requirement not demonstrated; no failing tests provided. Code quality itself is solid (proper Set-StrictMode, error handling, least-privilege perms, pinned actions), but deliverable is non-functional and incomplete. Task explicitly requires tests runnable via act; cannot be satisfied without the test file.
